mapper.select: SELECT f.id AS favoriteId, f.product_id AS productId, f.create_time AS favoriteTime, p.title, p.price, p.images AS coverImage, p.status, p.condition_level AS conditionLevel, c.name AS campusName, u.id AS sellerId, u.nick_name AS sellerNickName FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN campus c ON p.campus_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
